code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
    - Explicit repurchasing/gifting behavior mentioned despite minor issues →5
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Multiple failures within ≤3 months with explicit condemnation
    - Safety hazards/complete failure + purchase warnings
    - Replacement units showing identical defects →1

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - Functional but creates new problems (odor/noise/workarounds)
    - Underperforms competitors significantly →2
    - Degrades rapidly despite proper maintenance →2

    3 Stars (Neutral/Mixed):
    - Balanced pros/cons with conflicted language
    - Temporary solutions requiring imminent replacement →3

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Maintenance requirements impacting convenience →4
    - Style praise with functional compromises →4
    - Explicit star deduction for specific flaws →4

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Core utility exceeds skeptical expectations →5
    - Maintenance presented as justified tradeoff →5
    - Solves persistent problems others couldn't →5

    BOUNDARY CLARIFICATIONS:
    - "Requires ironing" + frustration →4 vs "Worth ironing" + enthusiasm →5
    - Comparative phrasing: "Better than expected" →5 vs "Better than bad" →4
    - Updates: "Still works with quirks" →5 vs "Works but degraded" →4
</DynamicRules>
</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "UPDATE: Failed after 2 months. New models are junk!"
<Reasoning>Multiple rapid failures with quality condemnation</Reasoning>
<Rating>1</Rating>

Example 2:
Review: "Underperforms Bissel/Rug Doctor - only surface cleans"
<Reasoning>Negative comparison showing core failure</Reasoning>
<Rating>2</Rating>

Example 3:
Review: "Does the job temporarily until I can upgrade"
<Reasoning>Temporary adequacy without commitment</Reasoning>
<Rating>3</Rating>

Example 4:
Review: "Christmas napkins stay crisp but require ironing after each wash"
<Reasoning>Maintenance requirement reduces convenience</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 5:
Review: "Between puppy messes and kids, this cleaner surprised me daily!"
<Reasoning>Exceeded skeptical expectations through utility</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 6:
Review: "Solved 5-year stain problem despite weekly deep cleans"
<Reasoning>Transformative benefit justifies maintenance</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 7:
Review: "Effective scrubber but confusing controls. Deducted one star"
<Reasoning>Explicit star reduction for usability issue</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 8:
Review: "This basic storage bin keeps items perfectly organized!"
<Reasoning>Core functionality satisfaction without extras</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

Example 9:
Review: "Love the design but uncomfortable for daily use"
<Reasoning>Style prioritized over core function</Reasoning>
<Rating>4</Rating>

Example 10:
Review: "Magazine organizers work when full but flimsy empty"
<Reasoning>Minor flaw in edge cases doesn't impact core</Reasoning>
<Rating>5</Rating>

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:
{"error_examples": "RULE COVERAGE:
  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (32 total misclassified):
  gold 4 -> 5: 15
  gold 5 -> 4: 11
  gold 1 -> 2: 2
  gold 1 -> 3: 1
  gold 3 -> 1: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "UPDATE
==================================
We purchased this Procter-Silex toaster in 2013 and it lasted 3 years.  We were okay with that.

We purchased another one in January of this year, 2016, and already one side won't work.  Less than 2 months is..."
     Gold: 1 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "returned, will not fit toilet scrubber"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 1 | Workers: [1, 1, 2] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "This is a sharp well made tablecloth. It's strengths are the vibrant colors, sharp contrast, and solid construction. The cons are just the inherent need to iron it that comes from the cotton."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "This is a sharp well made tablecloth.  It's strengths are the vibrant colors, sharp contrast, and solid construction.  The cons are just the inherent need to iron it that comes from the cotton."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "This really is a beautiful plate. You can definitely see and feel the Lenox quality. It is the perfect size for setting out cookies or cheeses at a dinner party. I really am looking forward to setting this out this year. Just keep in mind it does not..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "This design is very beautiful and elegant, yet so affordable.  I love this butter dish but the cover is a tad too tall to fit inside the place for butter in my new fridge.  However, I will use the cover when I set the butter out on the table.  It loo..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "Returned. Only because I decided to go with tiles and not a rug"
     Gold: 3 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [3, 5, 3] | Disagreement: 0.33
  2. Review: "In my house we have tile, carpet and hardwood so I was able to test this vac on all three.

WHAT I LIKED
--it was easy to put together.
--good suction
--retractable cord
--bagless
--easy to find on/off button. Can be turned on with foot
--pretty good..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "EDIT: A year of use later it's still humming along and doing its job just fine. Sometimes it seems like it doesn't pick up quickly that it should be upping its speed on its own in the auto setting, but maybe it's just taking longer for the air to rea..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 32 errors, 16 borderline out of 80 examples."}
